issues.detail: The skill does not explicitly cover error handling or edge cases such as invalid tokens or rate limiting failures.
The skill assumes a Node.js environment and uses TypeScript, limiting compatibility with non-Node AI agents.

scenarios.name: bulk-custom-field-update
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers all ClickUp steps except the initial token validation, while Response B is about Jira and does not meet any rubric requirements.

scenarios.name: urgent-task-slack-notifier
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most ClickUp‑specific requirements (webhook creation, Express handler, signature verification, priority check, Slack notification) but omits the GET /api/v2/user token validation; Response B uses Asana instead of ClickUp and misses all rubric items.
